example: Quicks makes your car selling experience stress-free.
ja: ストレスのない、気楽な

example: Quicks makes your car selling experience affordable.
zh: 負擔得起的，價格合理的
ja: 手頃な価格の、手に入れやすい

example: The process is quite easy and is two simple steps.
Get registered as a car dealer with us.
Then, upgrade your account to a business account.
Enter your business details and submit your form.
Advertise your car with us today.
